creator: nxjoseph@protonmail.com
text:
Created attachment 255584
www/py-torrequest.patch

The torrequest package provides a simple interface for making HTTP(S) requests
over the Tor network, ensuring user anonymity. It integrates easily with
existing Python applications and is compatible with standard HTTP libraries.

WWW:    https://github.com/erdiaker/torrequest \
        https://pypi.org/project/torrequest

Thanks in advance.
